mentions.note: Crushed by AI displacement fears despite strong fundamentals: GMV +35%, revenue +34%, operating income +88%, FCF +31%; major brand signings (LVMH, BevMo, Orvis); 1.9x growth rate valuation; unlikely to re-test $50s; buy on pullbacks to 92, 87.

34% revenue growth but guided to high-20s future growth. Cratered from $182 (Oct) to $105 (today). De-risked entry. First choice for startups; same fabulous company. Buy oversold quality when stock ice cold.
Reports Tuesday; chief e-commerce enabler for SMBs; Cramer always monitors their health; stock meandering; likely good numbers.
